plan.failureSummary: The deterministic run failed during a click action because the cached selector ('Select your occupation' combobox) does not exist on the current form layout. The live screenshot reveals that the page contains an 'Age Group' radio group instead of the occupation combobox, suggesting a dynamic/unstable or modified form layout.

remediationSteps.summary: Clear Page AI cache and retry the test
remediationSteps.details: Clear the Page AI cache and retry the automation run. This will force the AI agent to dynamically inspect the current page layout and adapt its actions accordingly rather than relying on the stale/different cached steps.

remediationSteps.summary: Disable deterministic caching if form layouts are randomly rotated
remediationSteps.details: If this survey page randomly alternates form fields across different test runs (as suggested by the 'unstable-survey' test name), deterministic caching should be disabled for this test. Update the test script to run in a fully dynamic/non-cached mode.

plan.notes: The survey form appears to have multiple dynamic layouts (e.g., 'Set 1' visible in the screenshot). Because the test was running in DETERMINISTIC mode, it attempted to use cached selectors from a different form layout variation, causing a selector resolution failure. Clearing the page AI cache will allow the AI agent to dynamically adapt to the current layout.
